Full Public Booking API Documentation

about 6 hours ago

Public-facing REST API for online booking, reservations, payments, and customer management. Designed for third-party integrations with FAST booking systems.

  • 2 Base Header Parameters

Base URL

https://api.bmileisure.com

Base Header Parameters

Parameter

Type

Suggested value

Description

Parameter

Type

Suggested value

Description

Accept-Language

string

en

Language of response properties

Content-Type

string

application/json

Content type for request bodies

Authorization

string

Bearer {token}

JWT bearer token (obtained from auth endpoint)

Security

The API is secured with JWT bearer token authentication. Clients obtain an access token by sending a POST request to /auth/token with username and password. The response includes a bearer access token valid for 3600 seconds that must be included in the Authorization header of all subsequent requests. The token contains a list of valid client keys — using a {clientKey} not included in the token results in a 401 response.

POST /auth/token

 

Request Body:

{ "Username": "...", "Password": "..." }

Request Fields:

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Username

String

Username to login

Yes

Password

String

Password to login

Yes

Response 200 OK:

{ "TokenType": "bearer", "AccessToken": "eyJhbG...", "ExpiresIn": "3600", "IncludedClientKeys": ["client1", "client2"] }

Response Fields:

Property

Data type

Description

Property

Data type

Description

TokenType

String

Token type, always "bearer"

AccessToken

String

JWT access token to use in Authorization header

ExpiresIn

String

Token validity duration in seconds

IncludedClientKeys

String[]

List of client keys this token is authorized for

Decoded JWT:

{ "alg": "HS256", "typ": "JWT" }.{ "clientkey": "...", "nbf": 1682089492, "exp": 1682093092, "iat": 1682089492 }.[Signature]

Usage: Include the token in all subsequent requests:

Authorization: Bearer eyJhbG...

Other possible responses: 400, 401

Error Handling

400 Bad Request

A 400 response returns an ErrorResponse DTO:

{ "Kind": 1, "Message": "..." }

Property

Data type

Description

Property

Data type

Description

Kind

ExceptionKind (int)

Type of error (see enum below)

Message

String

Human-readable error description

ExceptionKind Enum:

Value

Name

Description

Value

Name

Description

0

Unknown

Unknown/unclassified error

1

Validation

Input validation failure

2

Database

Database-level error

3

Business

Business rule violation

4

ActionRequired

Action required from the caller

401 Unauthorized

A 401 response indicates either an expired/invalid JWT token, or that the {clientKey} in the URL is not included in the JWT claims.

Other Status Codes

Code

Description

Code

Description

200

Success

400

Bad request / validation error

401

Unauthorized — missing, expired, or invalid token

404

Resource not found

500

Internal server error

Many endpoints also return an OperationStatus wrapper:

{ "Success": false, "ErrorMessage": "Description of what went wrong" }

Property

Data type

Description

Property

Data type

Description

Success

Boolean

Whether the operation succeeded

ErrorMessage

String

Error description (null when successful)

Endpoints

1. Retrieve all locations

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/locations

Get all locations from the cluster (multi-site setup).

Response 200 OK:

{ "Locations": [ { "ClientKey": "location-a", "Name": "Amsterdam Branch" }, { "ClientKey": "location-b", "Name": "Rotterdam Branch" } ] }

Response Fields — PublicLocationInfo:

Property

Data type

Description

Property

Data type

Description

Locations

PublicLocation[]

List of available locations

PublicLocation Fields:

Property

Data type

Description

Property

Data type

Description

ClientKey

String

Unique client key identifier for the location

Name

String

Display name of the location

Other possible responses: 400, 401, 500

2. Retrieve all pages available on a date

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/page?date={date}

Pages group products into categories for display in booking flows.

Request Parameters:

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Example

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Example

date

DateTime

Date on which pages should be available

Yes

2026-05-31T00:00:00.000Z

Response 200 OK:

[ { "id": 123, "Name": "Activities", "Kind": 0, "Products": [ { "Id": 123, "Name": "Bowling Lane 1hr", "Info": "<html>...</html>", "HasPicture": true, "BookingMode": 0, "ProductGroup": "Bowling", "MinAmount": 1, "MaxAmount": 10, "MinAge": 6, "MaxAge": 100, "Kind": 2, "IsCombo": false, "IsMembersOnly": false, "Prices": [ { "Amount": 25.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "Resources": [ { "Id": 1, "XRef": null, "Kind": "Race" } ], "DynamicGroups": [ { "Name": "Adult Drivers", "Tag": "adults", "MinQuantity": 1.0, "MaxQuantity": 10.0, "Id": 124, "Quantity": 0.0 } ], "XRef": null } ] } ]

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/page/{pageXref}

4. Retrieve all bookable products

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/products

Get all available bookable products. Response is cached for 1 hour.

Response 200 OK:

[ { "Id": 123, "Name": "Bowling Lane 1hr", "Info": "Full description text", "HasPicture": true, "IsCombo": false, "MinAge": 6, "MaxAge": 100, "IsMembersOnly": false, "MinAmount": 1, "MaxAmount": 10, "Kind": 2, "BookingMode": 0, "ProductGroup": "Bowling", "IsEntry": false, "Prices": [ { "Amount": 25.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "DynamicGroups": null, "XRef": null } ]

5. Return image of a product

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/image/product?productId={productId}

Retrieve the image for a product. Response is cached for 1 hour.

Request Parameters:

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

productId

Long

Identifier of the product

Yes

Response 200 OK: Binary image data with appropriate Content-Type header (e.g. image/png, image/jpeg)

Other possible responses: 400, 401, 404, 500

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Example

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Example

productId

Long

Identifier of picked product

Yes

123

dateFrom

Date

Beginning date to search availability (e.g. beginning of month)

Yes

2026-04-01

dateTill

Date

Ending date to search availability (e.g. end of month)

Yes

2026-04-30

Response 200 OK:

{ "Activities": [ { "Date": "2026-04-21", "Status": 0 }, { "Date": "2026-04-22", "Status": 0 }, { "Date": "2026-04-23", "Status": 1 } ] }

Other possible responses: 400, 401, 404, 500

8. Add product to cart (sell)

Endpoint URL: POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/booking/sell

Add a product to a reservation (creates a new order or adds to an existing shopping cart).

Request Body:

{ "ProductId": 123, "ProductXref": null, "Quantity": 2, "OrderId": null, "PersonId": null, "ParentOrderItemId": null, "DynamicLines": [ { "Id": 124, "Name": "Adult", "Tag": "adult", "MinQuantity": 1, "MaxQuantity": 10, "Quantity": 2.0 } ] }

Request Fields — PublicProductSellInfo:

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

ProductId

Long?

Identifier of the product to sell (use either this or ProductXref)

Yes*

ProductXref

String

External reference of the product (use either this or ProductId)

Yes*

Quantity

Decimal

Number of units to sell (must be > 0 and < 1000)

Yes

OrderId

Long?

Existing order ID to add to (null creates a new order)

No

PersonId

Long?

Person identifier to associate with the sale

No

ParentOrderItemId

Long?

Parent order item ID (for modifiers/supplements)

No

DynamicLines

PublicDynamicAgeGroup[]

Age group breakdown with quantities

No

  • Provide either ProductId or ProductXref, not both.

Response 200 OK:

{ "Success": true, "ErrorMessage": null, "OrderId": 1001, "OrderItemId": 5001, "Prices": [ { "Amount": 50.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "Modifiers": [ { "PageId": 10, "MinAmount": 0, "MaxAmount": 3, "PerPerson": false, "Products": [ { "Id": 200, "Name": "Extra cheese", "Info": "Add cheese topping", "HasPicture": false, "MinAmount": 0, "MaxAmount": 5, "Prices": [] } ] } ], "Supplements": [ { "PageId": 11, "Product": { "Id": 201, "Name": "Insurance", "Info": "Damage insurance", "HasPicture": false, "MinAmount": 0, "MaxAmount": 1, "Prices": [] } } ] }

9. Book a time slot

Endpoint URL: POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/booking/book

Book a product with a specific time slot (proposal) and optional contact person.

Request Body:

{ "ProductId": 123, "ProductXref": null, "Quantity": 2, "OrderId": 1001, "PersonId": null, "PageId": 456, "DynamicLines": [], "Proposal": { "ProductLineId": null, "Blocks": [ { "ProductLineIds": [789], "Block": { "Start": "2026-04-21T14:40:00", "Stop": "2026-04-21T14:55:00", "Name": "Session 1", "Capacity": 18, "FreeSpots": 12, "ResourceId": 1 } } ] }, "ContactPerson": { "PersonId": null, "FirstName": "John", "LastName": "Doe", "Email": "john@example.com", "Phone": "+31612345678", "OrderId": 1001 } }

Request Fields — PublicBookDriver:

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

ProductId

Long?

Identifier of the booked product (use either this or ProductXref)

Yes*

ProductXref

String

External reference of the product (use either this or ProductId)

Yes*

Quantity

Decimal

The number of people/units to book

Yes

OrderId

Long?

Existing order ID to add to (null creates new order)

No

PersonId

Long?

Person identifier

No

PageId

Long?

Identifier of the page the product was selected from

No

DynamicLines

PublicDynamicAgeGroup[]

Age group breakdown

No

Proposal

PublicProposal

The time slot proposal to book (obtained from availability endpoint)

Yes

ContactPerson

PublicContactPerson

Contact person information; if omitted, a no-name booking is created

No

  • Provide either ProductId or ProductXref, not both.

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

ProductLineId

Long?

Product line identifier

No

Blocks

PublicProposalItem[]

Time blocks to book (must not be empty)

Yes

PublicContactPerson Fields:

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

PersonId

Long?

Existing person ID (null for new person)

No

FirstName

String

First name

No

LastName

String

Last name

No

Email

String

Email address (must be valid format; required if no Phone)

Yes**

Phone

String

Phone number (required if no Email)

Yes**

OrderId

Long

Order ID to associate the contact person with

No

** At least one of Email or Phone is required.

Response 200 OK:

{ "Success": true, "ErrorMessage": null, "OrderId": 1001, "OrderItemId": 5002, "Prices": [ { "Amount": 50.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "Modifiers": [], "Supplements": [], "Schedules": [ { "Start": "2026-04-21T14:40:00", "Name": "Lane 1", "Quantity": 2, "ResourceId": 1 } ] }

10. Save memo for an order

Endpoint URL: POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/booking/memo

Save a memo/note for an existing order.

Request Body:

{ "OrderId": 1001, "Memo": "Please prepare a birthday cake" }

Property

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Yes

12. Get order overview

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/order/{orderId}/overview

Get a detailed overview of an order including line items, pricing, taxes, and schedule.

Request Parameters:

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

orderId

Long

Identifier of the order

Yes

Response 200 OK:

{ "OrderId": 1001, "OrderReference": "RES-2026-001", "Date": "2026-04-21T10:00:00", "SubTotal": [ { "Amount": 50.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "TotalTax": [ { "Amount": 10.50, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "BTW", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "Surcharge": [], "Total": [ { "Amount": 60.50, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "TotalToDeposit": 60.50, "TotalPaid": 0.00, "AppliedPromoCodes": [], "Lines": [ { "OrderItemId": 5001, "ParentOrderItemId": null, "Name": "Bowling Lane 1hr", "Quantity": 2.0, "Kind": 2, "Discount": 0, "TotalTax": 10.50, "OrderItemKind": 0, "TotalPrice": [ { "Amount": 50.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "PricePerUnit": [ { "Amount": 25.00, "Kind": 0, "ShortName": "m", "DepositKind": 0 } ], "VoucherCode": null, "ProductGroup": "Bowling", "ProductId": 123, "RequiresMembership": false, "Schedules": [], "ScheduledTime": { "Start": "2026-04-21T10:00:00", "Stop": "2026-04-21T11:00:00" }, "Comments": [], "Modifiers": [], "Supplements": [] } ], "ScheduleDays": [ { "Date": "2026-04-21T00:00:00", "Schedules": [] } ] }

13. Cancel an order

Endpoint URL: DELETE /public-booking/{clientKey}/order/{orderId}/cancel

Cancel an existing order (before payment).

Request Parameters:

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Parameter

Data type

Description

Mandatory

orderId

Long

Identifier of the order to cancel

Yes

Response 200 OK: Empty response on success

Other possible responses: 400, 401, 404, 500

14. Confirm external payment

Endpoint URL: POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/payment/confirm

Confirm a payment from an external payment provider and receive booking confirmation.

Request Body:

{ "Id": "pay_abc123", "PaymentTime": "2026-04-21T13:31:54.135Z", "Amount": 60.50, "OrderId": 1001, "ExtraData": { "provider": "stripe", "transactionId": "txn_xyz789" } }

Request Fields — PublicPaymentInfo:

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Property

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Id

String

Identifier of the external payment (stored for reference)

Yes

PaymentTime

DateTime (UTC)

UTC datetime when payment was confirmed

Yes

Amount

Decimal

The amount that has been paid

Yes

OrderId

Long

Identifier of the order

Yes

ExtraData

Dictionary<string, string>

Additional properties from the payment provider

No

Response 200 OK:

{ "Status": 0, "ReservationNumber": "RES-2026-001", "ReservationCode": "rABC123", "OrderId": "1001" }

Response Fields — PublicPaymentResult:

Property

Data type

Description

Property

Data type

Description

Status

PaymentStatus (int)

Payment status:

0 = Confirmed,

1 = Cancelled,

2 = Failed,

3 = Uncertain,

4 = BillNotFound,

5 = Pending,

6 = PaymentNotFound,

7 = Voided,

8 = DepositsNotProcessed

ReservationNumber

String

Reservation reference number

ReservationCode

String

Reservation code (replacement for QR code payload, format: r{id})

OrderId

String

Order identifier

Other possible responses: 400, 401, 404, 500

15. Look up a person

Endpoint URL: GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/person?email={email}&birthDate={birthDate}

No

1990-05-15

17. Register a project person (participant)

Endpoint URL: POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/person/registerProjectPerson

18. Get subscription products

Data type

Description

Mandatory

Yes

pageXRef

Yes

productXRef

No

Other possible responses: 400, 401, 500

{ "Id": 1000, "FullName": "John Doe", "Alias": "JD", "Email": "jd@email.com", "CreatedClientKey": "...", "Memberships": [ { "ProductXRef": "XREF-001", "Name": "Gold", "Starts": "2026-04-21T10:00:00", "Stops": "2026-05-21T11:00:00" } ] }

AvailabilityStatus

Value

Name

Description

Value

Name

Description

0

Available

Product is available on this date

1

FullyBooked

Product is fully booked on this date

Typical Booking Flow

1. Authenticate → POST /auth/token 2. Get products → GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/products 3. Check available days → GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/availability?productId=...&dateFrom=...&dateTill=... 4. Get time slots → POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/availability?date=... 5. Book with time slot → POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/booking/book 6. Review order → GET /public-booking/{clientKey}/order/{orderId}/overview 7. Confirm payment → POST /public-booking/{clientKey}/payment/confirm

Notes

  • All date/time values use ISO 8601 format

  • {clientKey} identifies the tenant/location in the multi-tenant system

  • Product images are served as binary — check HasPicture before requesting

  • The DisplayPrice array pattern supports multi-currency and split deposit/full pricing

  • CORS is enabled for all origins on all endpoints

  • Enum values are serialized as integers in JSON responses

{"serverDuration": 129, "requestCorrelationId": "e8753973994a436986ffb74b027ea2de"}
